items.title: Inventory Always Synchronized
items.description: It connects to your online store or current system. If a product runs out on your website, the agent knows instantly and won't sell it.

items.title: Complete Omnichannel Presence
items.description: A single intelligent brain responding simultaneously on WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook Messenger, and Telegram.

items.title: In-Chat Payments
items.description: The customer never escapes to other pages. We generate secure payment buttons directly in the conversation.

items.title: Understands Audio and Images
items.description: Did they send you a photo of a shoe or a 3-minute audio? Our AI processes it and answers exactly what the customer is looking for.

chat.welcome: Hello! I am the FluxAgent Commercial Intelligence. I am connected to your store's database and can sell via WhatsApp, Instagram, or Messenger. How can I help you today?
responses: My technology used to cost millions of dollars, but now you can use me for a fraction of that cost.
All the information you give me is protected with bank-grade security. No one else accesses your data.
Whether you have 1 or 10,000 customers writing to you at the same time, I serve them all instantly.
I give you super powers free for 7 days so you can test how I multiply your sales.
I synchronize in real time. If you change the price of a product in your store, I offer it with the new price the next second.
